title: Department Manager Vacancy at ITC Hotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at ITC Hotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
ITC Hotels is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ITC Hotels:
ITC Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
